message:
feat(attention): canonical flag names and robot-inspect-coordination action

Migrate all attention NextAction args from deprecated --session=/--file=
forms to canonical --robot-*= flag format (e.g. --robot-diff=myproject,
--robot-tail=myproject --panes=2 --lines=50). Replace the nonexistent
robot-locks action with robot-inspect-coordination, which points at the
agent name behind a reservation conflict rather than a session-level
lock view.

Add attentionReservationConflictActions() and
attentionReservationConflictAgent() helpers that extract the relevant
agent from conflict details and build multi-step next-action guidance
(status -> inspect-coordination -> diff).

Update supportedAttentionActionNames map: remove robot-locks, add
robot-inspect-coordination.

Tests: attention_feed_test validates canonical arg forms in both
bus-event reservation and file conflict paths, adds
TestNewReservationConflictEvent_UsesCanonicalNextActions for the
watcher.FileConflict path.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
